items.briefing:
Australian schools using the Canvas learning platform should be aware of a recent cyber breach affecting the system, which may have exposed student and staff data — check with your IT team if your organisation uses Canvas. Separately, a surge in "device code phishing" attacks has been flagged, where scammers trick people into handing over account access through legitimate-looking login prompts. Athletes and public figures are also being increasingly targeted by sophisticated online scams, including impersonation fraud.

**Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected login request or verification code you didn't initiate, do not approve it — contact your IT helpdesk immediately.
